# ArogyaDesk

> Offline-first clinic management desktop app for solo doctors ‚Äî built with Electron, React, and SQLite.

ArogyaDesk is a free, open-source Windows desktop application that helps a single doctor manage patient records, visit history, prescriptions, and billing entirely offline. No cloud account, no subscription, no internet required. Patient data stays on the doctor's own computer.

## Core capabilities

- Patient registration and search (by name or phone)
- Visit history per patient ‚Äî symptoms, diagnosis, prescription notes, charges, discounts
- PDF receipt export per visit
- Doctor and clinic profile setup
- Attach local files (prescriptions, reports) to visits
- Backup and restore of the local SQLite database

## Tech stack

- **Electron** (v29) ‚Äî desktop shell and main process
- **React 18 + Vite** ‚Äî renderer/UI
- **better-sqlite3** ‚Äî synchronous local SQLite database
- **react-router-dom v6** ‚Äî client-side routing via HashRouter
- **electron-builder** ‚Äî Windows NSIS installer packaging

## Source layout

- `electron/main.js` ‚Äî Electron main process, IPC handlers, PDF generation, backup/restore
- `electron/preload.js` ‚Äî Context bridge exposing `window.electronAPI` to the renderer
- `electron/database.js` ‚Äî SQLite schema definition and all DB query functions
- `src/App.jsx` ‚Äî Route definitions
- `src/pages/` ‚Äî Screen-level React components (Home, NewPatient, PatientProfile)
- `src/components/` ‚Äî Reusable UI (PatientCard, VisitForm, VisitHistory, EditPatientModal)
- `src/pdfTemplate.js` ‚Äî HTML template used for PDF receipt generation

## IPC API (window.electronAPI)

Patients: `searchPatients`, `getAllPatients`, `getPatient`, `createPatient`, `updatePatient`, `deletePatient`

Visits: `getVisitsByPatient`, `getVisit`, `createVisit`, `updateVisit`, `deleteVisit`

Doctor: `getDoctorProfile`, `saveDoctorProfile`

Files: `selectFile`, `openFile`, `readImageAsBase64`

PDF: `generatePdf`

Backup: `backupDatabase`, `restoreDatabase`

## Database schema

- `patients` ‚Äî id, name, age, gender, phone, address, photo_path, notes, created_at
- `visits` ‚Äî id, patient_id, visit_date, symptoms, diagnosis, prescription, prescription_path, charges, discount, final_amount, notes, created_at
- `doctor_profile` ‚Äî id, name, clinic_name, specialization, phone, address, photo_path

## Development

```bash
npm install
npm run dev      # Vite dev server + Electron
npm run dist     # Build Windows installer (outputs to dist-electron/)
```

Requires Node.js 20+. Uses `electron-builder install-app-deps` postinstall for native module alignment.

## License

MIT ‚Äî free to use, fork, and distribute.
